title: Social media habits
description: Posting the perfect photo, doomscrolling at midnight and that one person who overshares everything — social media is our digital second life! See if your habits are as common as you think!

questions.text: Name something people do before posting a photo on Instagram.

answers.text: apply a filter or edit the lighting
take 20 shots to get the right one
ask a friend if it looks good

questions.text: Name a reason someone deletes a post after publishing it.

answers.text: not enough likes in the first hour
posted too late — no one will see it now

questions.text: What do people post too much of on social media?
Name something people say they'll stop doing on social media but don't.
Name something that makes someone instantly unfollow an account.

answers.text: too many ads or sponsored posts
a real-life fallout with that person

questions.text: Name something people secretly check on an ex's profile.

answers.text: if they've gained or lost weight

questions.text: Name a platform people spend too much time on.
What do people do when they see a great photo opportunity?

answers.text: ask someone to take their photo
take multiple shots from different angles
wait until the light is better
enjoy the moment and don't photograph

questions.text: Name something people lie about on social media.

answers.text: how happy or perfect their life is
that they don't care about likes

questions.text: What do people say when they're caught on their phone at 2am?

answers.text: just one more video then I'll sleep
I was just checking something quickly
I fell asleep with it in my hand
